questionHtml:
Two satellites W and X have the same mass. They have circular orbits around the same planet. W is closer to the surface than X. What quantity is smaller for W than for X?

A.  Gravitational force from the planet

B.  Angular velocity

C.  Orbital speed

D.  Orbital period

meta.title: Two satellites W and X have the same mass. They have circular orbits around the same planet. W is closer to the surface than X. What quantity is smaller for W than for X? A. Gravit
